summary: IVX Owner AI no longer blocks senior-developer mode status questions. The senior-developer runtime is live, owner-gated, and has working GitHub/Render credentials. Render is deployed and healthy on the latest commit.

ownerAIChat.answer: YES — IVX Senior Developer mode is live and owner-gated. CAPABILITIES: repo inspection, safe code patch, test/build runner, GitHub commit/push, Render deploy, production health verify, proof ledger.

whatChanged: backend/services/ivx-owner-ai-dev-mode.ts — added senior-developer mode status detection and positive answer; removed 'senior developer' from the generic developer-mode block list.
backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts — route senior-developer mode status questions to the new positive answer before the generic execution block.
backend/api/ivx-owner-passwordless-login.ts — fixed TypeScript type for the Supabase admin client.
Render env vars — set GITHUB_REPO_URL and IVX_OWNER_VARIABLES_ENCRYPTION_KEY on the live service.
GitHub + Render — synced code and deployed commit c4ca14a; service is live and healthy.
caveats: Owner Variables store still reports 'Unsupported state or unable to authenticate data' for encrypted values, but the process.env fallbacks are present and the senior-developer credential audit passes.
nextSteps: Owner can now ask 'Do you in a senior developer mode?' and get a YES answer.
To execute a real task, sign in as owner and ask 'Run a senior developer task: <goal>' or use Admin → IVX Developer Workspace.
